summary: Verified two-tier image system implementation. All features working: (1) Hero visual mode toggle on homepage with data-testid='hero-visual-mode-toggle', (2) ChatComposer visual mode toggle with data-testid='visual-mode-toggle', (3) Toggle switches between Stock (camera icon) and Custom (sparkles icon, amber styling), (4) Backend image-prefetch.js functions (detectImageCategories, getStockPhotos, buildImagePromptContext, hasVisualIntent) all working correctly, (5) estimateRequestCost returns 3x for custom visual mode, (6) JSON sanitizer present in service.js lines 1693-1740.

detectImageCategories.details: Correctly detects 'plants' for plant-related prompts, 'food' for restaurant prompts, empty array for non-visual prompts

getStockPhotos.details: Returns valid Unsplash URLs with url, alt, and category fields

buildImagePromptContext.details: Generates correct prompt context with 'Curated stock' for stock mode and 'Custom AI-generated' for custom mode

hasVisualIntent.details: Correctly detects visual signals like 'stunning', 'beautiful', 'hero image', 'gallery'

estimateRequestCost_stock.details: Returns base cost (1.0 for gpt-4o) for stock mode

estimateRequestCost_custom_3x.details: Returns 3x cost (3.0 for gpt-4o) for custom mode

json_sanitizer.details: Intercepts leaked JSON with files array and executes as file writes

hero_visual_mode_toggle.details: Toggle renders on homepage, switches between Stock (camera icon) and Custom (sparkles icon, amber styling)

chat_composer_visual_mode_toggle.details: Toggle renders in ChatComposer when inside a project, switches correctly between modes

visual_mode_state_flow.details: visualMode state flows from Dashboard.jsx through LeftPanel.jsx to ChatComposer.jsx

stream_handler_visualMode_passthrough.details: visualMode: metadata.visualMode || undefined passed to processMessageStream

service_js_image_prefetch_logic.details: Image prefetch logic correctly handles stock vs custom mode, with fallback to stock on custom failure

critical_code_review_comments: All image-prefetch module functions correctly implemented with proper keyword detection and URL generation
Visual mode toggle UI correctly implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
3x credit multiplier for custom mode correctly implemented in estimateRequestCost
JSON sanitizer correctly intercepts leaked JSON and converts to file writes
Proper fallback from custom to stock mode on generation failure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-tier image system fully implemented and tested. Hero toggle at Dashboard.jsx:2302-2320, ChatComposer toggle at ChatComposer.jsx:305-318. Image prefetch logic at service.js:498-536. JSON sanitizer at service.js:1693-1740. All tests pass.
